plan.failureSummary: The cached deterministic selectors failed to resolve the 'Documentation' element under the 'Resources' dropdown. Looking at the live failure screenshot, the hover/click on 'Resources' did not successfully render or keep open the dropdown menu containing 'Documentation', or the underlying link selectors have drifted.
observedIndicators: Selector resolution failed on step 2 for 'Documentation'
The failure screenshot shows 'Resources' is highlighted but the dropdown is not visibly open

remediationSteps.summary: Clear page.ai cache and retry the automation
remediationSteps.details: Run the test again with clearPageAiCache set to true to force page.ai to locate the updated 'Documentation' menu item under 'Resources' dynamically.

plan.notes: In DETERMINISTIC mode, cached selectors failed during step 2. Clearing the page.ai cache and forcing a fresh autonomous execution run will allow Donobu to re-scan the DOM, identify the correct path/selectors for the 'Documentation' option, and self-heal.
